title: EliBruh_'s Custom Hats
description: Custom Hats that can be made from renaming a Carved Pumpkin!
body:
Ever wanted custom hats in Vanilla Minecraft? This pack comes with some!

I will create some sort of place for anyone who wishes to leave suggestions for this project soon.

The gallery contains previews of the items currently added.

You are allowed to use this resource pack in any modpack you'd like. :)

Do not re-upload this resource pack anywhere.

To see the list of items you can rename the Carved Pumpkin to, please refer to the wiki. :)
